infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Firmanet needs your location to show nearby incidents and send SOS alerts to your trusted contacts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Firmanet needs your location to send real-time safety alerts and enable emergency SOS features.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Firmanet needs your location to send real-time safety alerts and enable emergency SOS features.
